log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Verdan — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Verdan — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Verdan — Winged Striker HP: 54/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Verdan — Winged Striker HP: 35/67
--- Verdan — Winged Striker --- HP: 35/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Verdan — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Verdan — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Verdan — Winged Striker HP: 13/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Verdan — Winged Striker HP: -3/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Verdan — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
